---
title: "Alex Vogt"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: bluesky
      text: Bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
---

## Education
Alex Vogt is an undergraduate student at Colgate University  graduating in May of 2026 with a major in Economics and a minor in Applied Mathematics.

## Experience

NERA | Antitrust Intern | June 2025 - August 2025
NERA | Incoming Antitrust Research Associate | July 2026  

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.
